intent_precise: PCR Prep and Pooling with 384 Plates: Using pcr_plate_384 (plate, slot 8), pool_plate (pcr_plate, slot 5).
intent: For this PCR prep and pooling protocol, you'll be working with two plates - set up the 384-well PCR plate in slot 8 and place the pooling plate (which is also a PCR plate format) in slot 5. This protocol involves preparing your PCR reactions in the 384-well format and then consolidating samples into the pooling plate. Make sure both plates are properly positioned in their designated slots before starting the automated transfers.

output_schema.protocol_name: PCR Prep and Pooling with 384 Plates
output_schema.author: Rami Farawi <rami.farawi@opentrons.com>
